name: venture-capital-intelligence
tagline: Built with love & rationality for the venture capital & startup ecosystem.
description: 3 skills · 6 agents · 9 commands built from the best open-source VC tools. Screen startups across 8 dimensions, analyze pitch decks slide-by-slide, explain any equity term in plain English, run DCF + SaaS metrics models, compute cap table dilution and exit waterfalls, size markets with TAM/SAM/SOM, scan companies for deal-sourcing signals, and generate LP fund reports. Works for VCs, founders, angels, PE firms, and family offices.
